name: Ritsuko Akizuki
description: **Hometown:** Tokyo **Height:** 156 cm The cool, smart-girl type, Ritsuko believes in theory more than her own inner strength. Originally an intern working at 765 Production after graduating from high school, due to a lack of girls scouted by 765 Production Ritsuko became an idol herself. Though despite being an idol, she still has one hand in the business side of her own celebrity, and is quick to chide the Producer if she thinks he isn't doing his job right. name: Rosmontis
description: __Place of Birth:__ Columbia Rosmontis, Rhodes Island's Elite Operator, is skilled in the rare Originium Arts of excelling in killing large creatures, destroying hard targets, facility emergency braking and skirmish disruption. She demonstrates strong battlefield control and significant tactical value in offensive, positional and annihilation warfare. Assigned by Kal'tsit, she now plays a central role in the initiation of the War of Annihilation.

name: Ryouka Narusawa
description: __Height:__ 153cm __Address:__ Kichijoji __Handle:__ Ryo-tas ~!Ryouka's real name is Aveline Narusawa Tesla. She is the daughter of Nikola Tesla. Aveline's real body died a long time ago, but lives on as an astral body, in other terms, as a ghost. She is the person who was giving orders to Yuuta Gamon the entire time. She is very knowledgeable about what a ghost truly is: "The soul, in other words, electromagnetism with memories and personalities, is the astral body." She explains to Yuuta about

description: __Height:__ 178cm __Ability:__ Falling Camellia Member of Port Mafia, "Black Lizards" Assault Unit Captain. His ability, Falling Camellia, cause things that he touches to fly backward with immense force.

name: Sadi-chan
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (6'0") __Affiliations:__ Impel Down __Occupations:__ Chief Guard Sadi-chan is the chief guard of Impel Down. Her name comes from the word sadism. Due to the "-chan" part of her name coincides with the Japanese honorific, people tend to mistake it as such. Sadi-chan resembles a dominatrix in design. She dresses in a very skimpy devil-themed outfit. She carries around a pitchfork and wears a headpiece that resembles horns. She has long hair that covers her eyes. She also wears c

name: Seiko Kotobuki
description: __Height__: 148 cm Has a large crush on Otani. ~!She is biologically male and states that God placed her in the wrong body. Prefers to be called Seiko instead of Seishiro because it sounds more feminine. Gave Otani his first kiss, but he later found out she was physically male when she took off her shirt when tending to his injury in the school infirmary. She was afraid that Otani would think she was disgusting, but Otani stated that he didn't think such a thing and they remained friends. !~

name: Selka Zuberg
description: She is is an apprentice to Sister Azariya and is Alice's sister. She is capable of using Sacred Arts and lives at Rulid's church with the orphans. She dislikes how she is constantly compared to her sister Alice. She takes care of Kirito upon his return to Underworld.

description: Serena Rinnen is a Regular who passed most of the tests on the Second Floor and was assigned the Scout position.

name: Shiina Usami
description: __Type:__ Lonely Girl __Occupation:__ Ohananomitsu High School 2nd Year Student __Debut:__ Chapter 168 **Girlfriend No. 028** Shiina is an overjoyed girl who likes to blend in crowded places. She has autophobia which prevents her from doing solo activities (e.g. eating lunch at school and going to the bathroom by herself), but she just has to hold it in at the short time. She will panic and run away in tears if she feels lonely, much like a rabbit.

name: Shinji Mimura
description: Boy #19 Shinji Mimura uses his intellect to invent an escape plan. ~!His first plan is to hack into the government's computer and disable their collars, and then bomb the school. He is unsuccessful at hacking into the computer, since he discusses his plan with a fellow student, and the conversation is transmitted through his collar back to the teacher, who puts a stop to that plan. name: Sora Takanashi
description: __Height:__ 152 cm She is the oldest of the three sisters. 2nd grade in the middle school, 14 years old. She has tsundere personality. She normally refers to Yuuta as older brother (Onii-chan). She is a good student in school and is not good at cooking. ~! It is visible that she has a crush on Yuuta Segawa in episode 1 and likes older guys like Miu.!~

name: Soundwave
description: Megatron's right-hand man. A loyal and cold subordinate, he is often tasked with spying on the Autobots, which he often accomplishes with the aid of his cassette minions Laserbeak, Frenzy, Rumble, Buzzsaw and Ratbat. In the Headmasters anime, an aide to Galvatron. ~!Following his fight against Blaster in the Headmasters anime and the subsequent destruction and death of both of them, he is rebuilt and renamed to Soundblaster (サウンドブラスター), aka "New Soundwave" in the Omni Productions English dub.!~

name: Sumeragi Lee Noriega
nativeName: スメラギ・李ノリエガ
description: __Height:__ 163cm Tactical forecaster of the Celestial Being mothership Ptolemaios. Not a captain but essentially the top ranking officer on the ship so she takes command. She basically plans all the tactics the Gundam Meisters take part in. Her strategic predictions are almost always very accurate. However, she enjoys drinking, even in the middle of an operation, and is frequently seen with a liquor flask in hand. She went to college with Billy Katagiri, and they both had Ralph Aifman as a prof

name: Taii
description: The Captain is a member of the Millennium forces and the Waffen-SS. The Captain is Major Montana Max's silent, stoic adjutant and bodyguard. Unlike the Major and Lieutenant Rip van Winkle, he still wears a full uniform, which is similar to a M42 Greatcoat with its neckguard constantly turned up, and an M43 officer's cap emblazoned with the Totenkopf symbol. The Captain is a natural werewolf, able to transform at will and fight in either human or werewolf form. Hans once fought Walter and Alucard

name: Takane Saibara
description: A scion and the grandson of the Takaba company's president. He has an arrogant personality and dislikes the commoner's lifestyle. Despite his personality, he is surprisingly an intelligent and capable office worker. He loves home-cooked or top-quality dishes and dislikes pre-packaged food. Takane enjoys being on high places, such as tall buildings.

name: Wooyeon Song
description: Song Wooyeon is the main protagonist of Spirit Fingers. She is the older sister of Song Woodol and younger sister of an anonymous brother. Wooyeon is also a member of the Spirit Fingers club, her being babl (baby blue) finger.

name: Yatsude Negoro
description: **Height:** 161 cm **Nishitaga High School:** Class 2-B The stern, wry, sometimes mischievous third wheel to Kei and Rei's antics. President of the Film Studies club (which only has 2 members). She always speaks in Kansai-ben and loves to meddle in others' affairs. Has a favorite idol and frequently goes to her handshake events. Has a habit of sleeping in class and has never been caught thanks to her eyes usually being so narrow.
